title: Speculative pre-warm of the synthesis tail: Grounding Pack + background PRD drafter
problem_statement: After a grill ends, the Team Lead waits ~6–9 minutes watching the agent author the ADR→PRD→issues synthesis tail before real work starts. Roughly 40% of that is decision-independent grounding — re-reading the schemas, the CONTEXT glossary, and the ADR index, and minting UUIDs — work that is identical on every run, plus an avoidable schema fix-loop (e.g. learning at validate-time that a field is an array). It is dead time at the keyboard, and it recurs every time the Lifecycle reaches synthesis.
solution: Pre-warm the grounding so synthesis starts from a resolved pack instead of re-walking the .excn tree, and speculatively draft the PRD in the background during the grill so a draft already exists when the grill ends. Both are gitignored, regenerable Runtime Records under .excn/runtime/ that are never authoritative: synthesis reads them only as a starting point, regenerates every decision-bearing field, and falls back to from-scratch authoring when they are absent, stale, or schema-invalid. The result: the grounding tax and the schema fix-loop disappear, and the grill→PRD step feels like activating a tab that is already loaded.

user_stories.want: synthesis to read a pre-resolved Grounding Pack instead of re-walking the .excn tree on every run
user_stories.benefit: the ~40% decision-independent grounding tax and the schema fix-loop disappear from the wait

user_stories.want: a pool of pre-minted UUIDv7 ids ready in the pack
user_stories.benefit: minting an ADR or PRD id costs no CLI round-trip during synthesis

user_stories.want: the PRD speculatively drafted in the background as the grill unfolds
user_stories.benefit: a draft already exists the moment the grill ends, instead of authoring from zero

user_stories.want: the speculative draft verified-and-landed with its decision-bearing fields regenerated
user_stories.benefit: a draft built against the mid-flight grill never anchors the final PRD to a stale framing

user_stories.want: pre-warm to be a pure accelerator with an always-present from-scratch fallback
user_stories.benefit: synthesis never breaks or blocks when the pack or draft is missing, stale, or invalid

implementation_decisions.title: Deterministic Grounding Pack regenerator + a warm verb
implementation_decisions.summary: A new policy module resolves a Grounding Pack Runtime Record with no model call: a schema digest (required fields + the array-vs-string traps named explicitly), the CONTEXT glossary terms, the ADR index (id + title + status), the CLI stamp (verbs + issue-create flags), and a small UUIDv7 pool. It is exposed as a new Scaffolder CLI verb so it can be run by hand and by the hook. Same inputs must produce a byte-identical pack.

implementation_decisions.title: Feature-flagged staleness hook regenerates the pack
implementation_decisions.summary: A data/logic hook pair (the established rules.cjs + hook.cjs split) regenerates the pack when any source — a schema, CONTEXT, or an ADR — is newer than the pack. It is default-off in hooks.config.json (ADR-0006: hooks sense and remind, fail-safe, invocation-logged), and never a hard dependency of synthesis.

implementation_decisions.title: execution-to-prd reads the pack and drains the UUID pool
implementation_decisions.summary: The PRD synthesis skill consumes the Grounding Pack as its starting point and takes an id from the pool instead of shelling the uuid verb, falling back to reading the tree by path when the pack is absent or stale. This is the slice that delivers the measurable grounding-tax win on its own.

implementation_decisions.title: Grill decisions log as the continuously-modified scratch surface
implementation_decisions.summary: execution-epic-grill appends each crystallised decision to an append-only grill-decisions Runtime Record — the surface a background drafter watches, kept separate from the conversation transcript.

implementation_decisions.title: Long-lived background PRD drafter, fed live from the first grill answer
implementation_decisions.summary: The grill spawns a long-lived, named drafter when the first question is answered; each subsequent answer is fed to it live (appended to the decisions log and signalled), and it continuously rewrites the speculative PRD-draft Runtime Record as the grill unfolds. It writes only under .excn/runtime/ — never the authoritative .excn/prds/ — and the draft is promoted by verify-and-land at grill end. (Amended 2026-06-24: the lead chose live-from-first-answer over the originally-scoped checkpoint-respawn, for maximum grill overlap.)

implementation_decisions.title: Verify-and-land contract at hand-back
implementation_decisions.summary: execution-to-prd accepts the draft's stable fields (problem, actors, user stories), regenerates the decision-bearing fields (implementation and testing decisions), and lands the real PRD through the normal write path. The draft is never trusted wholesale.

implementation_decisions.title: Gitignore-contract widening and manifest growth
implementation_decisions.summary: The stamped .excn/.gitignore widens (ADR-0005/0008) to exclude the pre-warm Runtime Records while leaving the version-controlled work-tracking set unchanged; the Template manifest gains the new stamped files (policy module, hook pair, flag entry). Src-First: every change lands in src/template first, then mirrors to the dogfood root.

implementation_decisions.title: Fix the dogfood dependency range
implementation_decisions.summary: The dogfood root pins to-execution at a range that cannot resolve the dogfooded version, so npx silently runs a stale CLI missing the newer verbs. Bump the range so the root actually dogfoods the shipped version; until then, work uses the local source entrypoint.

testing_decisions: package-qa verifies the new stamped files appear in the manifest and the published tarball, and that the gitignore widening keeps the work-tracking set version-controlled while excluding the pre-warm Runtime Records.
A node --test unit proves the regenerator is deterministic (identical inputs → byte-identical pack) and that the schema digest names the array-vs-string field traps.
A node --test unit proves staleness detection regenerates when a source is newer and no-ops when the pack is fresh.
A fallback test proves synthesis with an absent, stale, or schema-invalid pack falls back to from-scratch authoring with no error and no blocking.
cli-code-quality-reviewer gates the new policy module and the hook pair before each slice is declared done.
out_of_scope: Pre-drafting issues — execution-to-issues reads settled PRD fields that do not exist until the PRD lands, so the drafter targets the PRD only.
Pre-warming ADRs — they are already authored inline during the grill, so there is no serial ADR stage to overlap.
Any model call inside the regenerator — the Grounding Pack is produced deterministically.
Making the background drafter mandatory — it is opt-in and feature-flagged; the pack alone is the no-background-agent first phase.
notes: Synthesized 2026-06-23 from this session, the transcript-measured synthesis-tail finding, and the research records .excn/research/instant-start-proposals.md and speculative-background-drafting.md. Governed by ADR 019ef6f4-45f8-7d08-ba43-c194758d7dc2 (speculative pre-warm runtime staging). Phase order: implementation_decisions 1–3 (Grounding Pack) ship before 4–6 (background drafter).
